_comment: Downloadable market-data extensions. Each entry maps to a source dir at external_data/extension_data/<source> (a disposable cache). 'url' is the hosted archive to download; null = placeholder (not hosted yet -> UI shows 'coming soon'). Delete removes the local dir to reclaim disk; re-download from 'url'. Active training/serving sources (crypto_of, funding, sentiment, live) are NOT extensions and never appear here.

extensions.label: Forex (1m)
extensions.description: Major FX pairs at 1-minute, resampled from Dukascopy ticks.
